title: New Moon
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''New Moon''' was [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi's]] [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] prior to and during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]]. She served under [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] ([[Shooting Star (call sign)|Shooting Star]]).

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''

[[Category:Squadron callsigns]]
